description_long: This bungalow features a low, wide profile with a prominent gable roof constructed from gray tiles. The exterior walls are a mix of tan brick and dark wooden beams, giving it a rustic yet sturdy appearance. A stone chimney rises from one side, adding architectural interest and suggesting a fireplace inside. The front includes a small fenced garden area with lush greenery, while a covered wooden porch extends along one side, providing a welcoming entrance. Windows are arranged in pairs and groups, some with decorative stained glass, allowing natural light to enter the interior. The overall design is compact and functional, ideal for a suburban or semi-rural neighborhood.
description: A tan brick and wood bungalow with a gray gable roof, stone chimney, fenced garden, and covered porch. Windows are grouped and some feature stained glass.
description_view_0: Side view showing the fenced garden, paired windows, and the main gable roof with the stone chimney visible.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the front garden, stained glass window, and the side of the stone chimney.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stone chimney, grouped windows, and a strip of greenery along the base.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the covered wooden porch and the full expanse of the gable roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and paired windows
